description_long: This is a medium-sized wooden chest of drawers with a natural wood grain finish and a slightly curved top edge. The front features three large drawers, each equipped with two round, metallic knobs for easy opening. The sides are plain, showcasing the wood's natural texture, while the back appears to be a flat, lighter-colored panel, likely for placement against a wall. The top surface is broad and flat, suitable for placing decorative items or everyday objects. The construction suggests it is sturdy and designed for storage, commonly found in urban interiors such as apartments, offices, or garages. The overall design is functional with a classic, understated aesthetic.
description: A wooden chest of drawers with three large drawers, metallic knobs, and a natural wood grain finish. It has a broad, flat top and a sturdy, functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing three drawers with six round metallic knobs and a curved top edge.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain wood grain side and the thickness of the top surface.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a flat, lighter-colored back panel with no visible features.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, highlighting the wood grain and the profile of the top.
